'''Yogurt''' was a type of food that could be made from a variety of [[milk]]s or [[Fungus|fungi]], such as mashed [[marsh fungi]] from the [[planet]] [[Dagobah]], the [[blue milk]] of the [[bantha]] [[species]],<ref name="AEYNTK" /> or [[moof milk]] from a [[moof]].<ref name="Cookbook" /> [[Jedi]] [[Grand Master]] [[Yoda]] kept marsh [[Fungus|fungi]] in his [[Yoda's Hut|pantry]] to make yogurt while he lived in exile on Dagobah.<ref name="AEYNTK" />

{{Food-stub}}
